title: Public community A733 Armbian repo audit

findings.finding: No useful public archive hit or maintainer reply was found for the A733/SUN60IW2 IDMAC descriptor-read question.
findings.decision: Continue monitoring; do not resend yet.

findings.finding: The public Orange Pi 4 Pro Armbian repository is primarily build scaffolding plus broad Armbian patch archives. Its A733 SDMMC0 material appears in a vendor BSP support-file patch with the same v5p3x node properties already audited: mmc_store, mmc_mbus, mmc_msi_lite, req-page-count=<2>, and ctl-spec-caps=<0x428>.
findings.decision: No new SDMMC0 IDMAC runtime delta was found.

findings.finding: The repo includes vendor-style aliases and BSP support blobs that are not appropriate upstream DTS material.
findings.decision: Do not import vendor aliases or support-file scaffolding into the upstream series.

conclusion: No kernel patch was made. The community repo did not add evidence beyond already-tested vendor-visible SDMMC0 properties.
